# ADR-014 Compliance — Global Platform Reference Architecture

**Governance phase:** 3.5 · **Authority document:** `docs/ADR-014-*.md` · **Date:** 2026-07-19
**Verifier:** `architecture/compliance/verify-architecture.mjs` · **Do not edit the ADR itself.**

## Purpose
Consolidate the entire corpus into one navigable reference — introduces zero new architecture.

## Scope
Pure consolidation/index of ADR-002…013.

## Current implementation status
**Proposed; Traced live — 60% compliant.**

## Implemented components
- This governance layer (matrix + evidence) is the live, queryable reference index
- Every migrated context traces to its ADRs

## Remaining work
- Keep the index current as contexts migrate

## Evidence
- MATRIX.md + EVIDENCE.md cross-reference every ADR

## Related source code
- `architecture/compliance/MATRIX.md`
- `architecture/compliance/EVIDENCE.md`

## Related tests
- (none yet — covered by review/live proof)

## Compliance percentage
**60%** — honest estimate: weight of ADR requirements realized under the ADR-005
layered architecture with evidence, vs. total requirements named in the ADR.

## Risks
- Reference drifts if matrix/evidence not updated per phase

## Required actions
- Update matrix + evidence as a deliverable of every future phase
